mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status IN (1,2,3) THEN o.pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) AS userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flower WHERE status = 1) AS flowerCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS todayOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() AND o.status IN (1,2,3) THEN o.pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayRevenue FROM `order` o

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, #{groupFormat}) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM `order` o WHERE o.status IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, COALESCE(SUM(oi.subtotal), 0) AS amount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS orderCount FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id AND o.status IN (1, 2, 3) JOIN flower f ON oi.flower_id = f.id JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC
SELECT f.name AS date, CAST(f.sales AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS amount, CAST(f.sales AS SIGNED) AS orderCount FROM flower f WHERE f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
